notes:
Watermark Lab 2.0.0 - a complete redesign.

What's new:
- Brand-new PySide6/Qt interface with a three-pane layout
- True-render live preview - see the genuine watermarked output as you type and adjust settings
- Drag & drop a file straight onto the app
- Editable transparency value - type an exact 0-100 percentage
- Colour palette swatches, editable hex value, and an eyedropper
- OneDrive-safe PowerPoint saving (fixes silent save failures in synced folders)
- Snug, auto-wrapped Word watermark text

Includes everything from 1.4.x:
- PowerPoint, Word and video watermarking
- Batch folder processing, saved presets, recent files
- PDF export, open-after-save, ffmpeg auto-download

Upgrading: existing 1.4.x users are offered this update automatically - click Yes to install and your presets and recent files are kept.
